# Sesivo

> Sesivo is a low-latency audio collaboration app for musicians, creators, and live remote audio.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sesivo.app/)
- [Downloads](https://sesivo.app/downloads.html)
- [Docs](https://sesivo.app/docs.html)
- [Site information JSON](https://sesivo.app/info.json)
- [Latest downloads](https://github.com/bgocumlu/sesivo/releases/latest)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/bgocumlu/sesivo)

## Notes

- The downloads page provides the latest macOS and Windows app downloads.
- Current direct downloads are `sesivo-0.1.0-macos-arm64.dmg` and `sesivo-0.1.0-windows-x64-portable.zip`.
- The homepage uses `assets/session.png` as the current app screenshot.
- Use the GitHub repository for the latest source code and project details.
